---
name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible problem in the server
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
---

## What happened?

Describe the observed behavior and the expected behavior.

## Minimal reproduction

List the exact commands or MCP tool call, with all credentials, phone numbers, chat identifiers, and message contents redacted.

## Environment

- Server version / Git commit:
- Java version:
- Deployment mode (local, Docker, remote):
- MCP client and version:

## Logs

Paste relevant redacted logs. Never include API hashes, bot tokens, API keys, session data, or private Telegram content.
